Chat.greeting: Hi, I’m Shiguang 👋. Tell me what ingredients you have, what you’re craving, or how much time you’ve got tonight—I’ll pick a dish.
Chat.placeholder: Tell Shiguang what you want to eat…
Chat.quick1Query: I have eggs and tomatoes in the fridge, what can I make?
Chat.quick2Query: A dinner I can make in 15 minutes

Chat.replyPantry: Based on your {count} ingredients, the best match is—
Chat.replyFallback: Tell me what’s in your fridge, what you’re craving, or how much time you have, and I’ll pick a dish. Or try the quick prompts below.
